report_text: Critical SQL Injection vulnerability identified in the login endpoint. CVE-2024-12345 may allow attackers to bypass authentication and access sensitive data.
High Cross-site Scripting vulnerability found on the customer portal. The issue may allow session hijacking and theft of user cookies.
Critical Remote Code Execution vulnerability discovered in the API service. CVE-2025-22222 may allow attackers to execute arbitrary commands.
Medium Server-Side Request Forgery vulnerability detected in the image import feature. Attackers may access internal services.
High Command Injection vulnerability exists in the diagnostics endpoint. The flaw may allow attackers to execute system commands.
Low Open Redirect vulnerability found in the redirect parameter. The issue may allow phishing attacks.
Critical Insecure Deserialization vulnerability identified in the session handler. CVE-2024-54321 may allow remote code execution.
Medium XML External Entity vulnerability discovered in the XML parser. The issue may allow file disclosure.
High Path Traversal vulnerability found in the download endpoint. Attackers may read arbitrary files from the server.
Critical Authentication Bypass vulnerability detected in the admin panel. CVE-2025-33333 may allow unauthorized access to privileged functions.
